input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure is caused by stale test code: org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.Iterables existed in janino 3.0.16 but was moved/renamed under org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator in the 3.1.x dependency. This is an API/package update issue, not missing setup.
Avoid optional Ant integration APIs unless the test intentionally adds org.apache.ant:ant, because janino declares Ant as optional/provided.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed for meaningful Janino coverage. The resolved janino 3.1.0 artifact declares commons-compiler 3.1.0 as a normal transitive dependency, and documented Janino usage is in-process Java compilation/evaluation without external services.
